title: Shillong, Meghalaya — Cost of Living, Housing & Relocation Guide [2026]
description: Complete guide to Shillong, Meghalaya: cost of living, home prices, neighborhoods, remote work readiness, and relocation tips.
content:
Overview

Shillong is a city in Meghalaya with a population of 450,000. The capital of Meghalaya, known as the Scotland of the East for its rolling hills, waterfalls, and pleasant year-round climate.

Last updated: July 19, 2026
